address.address: 810, W-1, Juhi Kalan, Saket Nagar India
address.map_location: Dr.Virendra Swarup Institute of Computer - Best BBA And BCA College In Kanpur/best MBA And BBA College/placement College

pos_sentences.text: Fees structure and high placement opportunities  for each student
pos_sentences.name: Abhinav Dixit

pos_sentences.text: high emphasis on co - curricular activites
pos_sentences.name: Abhinav Dixit

pos_sentences.text: The thing I like most about my College is the Highly Qualified, outstanding Faculty with Good Experience and Academics.
pos_sentences.name: Shaan Alam Ansari

pos_sentences.text: The Timing of Classes which is only approximately 4 hours per day maximum without any loss in academics.
pos_sentences.name: Shaan Alam Ansari

pos_sentences.text: Canteen is too good as the price is not very much high.
pos_sentences.name: Prashant dixit

pos_sentences.text: The quality education which the organization is providing including all sorts of teachings requeored for the overall growth.
pos_sentences.name: Aviral Tiwari

pos_sentences.text: The heads of departments are too supportive allow every initiative of students and try to implement all the new ways to improve learning.
pos_sentences.name: Aviral Tiwari

pos_sentences.text: Campus is also good, including library and computer rooms, seminar hall extra
pos_sentences.name: Arpita tripathi

pos_sentences.text: Focus towards the academic session and personality development
pos_sentences.name: Bharat Pandey

pos_sentences.text: Proper placements in top companies of India
pos_sentences.name: Kirti Shukla

neg_sentences.text: Poor transportation facilities for students living far away.
neg_sentences.name: Abhinav Dixit

neg_sentences.text: Lack of emotional connection with students
neg_sentences.name: Abhinav Dixit

neg_sentences.text: Small and limited Campus. No Big Canteens and Parks to eat and roam.
neg_sentences.name: Shaan Alam Ansari

neg_sentences.text: Long queues during biometric fingerprint attendance.
neg_sentences.name: Shaan Alam Ansari

neg_sentences.text: Long queues and time for issuing a book at library.
neg_sentences.name: Shaan Alam Ansari

neg_sentences.text: The parking area is sufficient but that is filled at shift time
neg_sentences.name: Shaurya Saxena

neg_sentences.text: During placements number of company that arrive are less
neg_sentences.name: Prashant dixit

neg_sentences.text: No park or ground is withe college premises.
neg_sentences.name: Aviral Tiwari

neg_sentences.text: 75 % Attandance is must otherwise pay fine.
neg_sentences.name: Arpita tripathi

neg_sentences.text: Extra curriculum is available but fees is so high
neg_sentences.name: Anshika Tripathi
